that's yours forever.

eNative gives every African a permanent, verified digital identity — an eNumber that never gets recycled, never requires a SIM, and works across every border on the continent.

YOUR NUMBER LASTS
THE PROBLEM

Africa's phone numbers disappear.

The Broken System
Across Africa, phone numbers are tied to SIM cards that get recycled, expire, or become inaccessible when you cross a border or switch carriers. Your number — your identity — disappears. Students lose professors. Entrepreneurs lose clients. Families lose each other.
The eNative Fix
Your eNumber lives in the cloud — not on a SIM. It's permanently assigned to you, verified through KYC, and works on any device with internet across all 54 African nations. It never changes. It never gets recycled. It's yours forever.
"Built for Africa. Not adapted for Africa."
TARYL OGLE · FOUNDER · EONX
FEATURES

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

📞 Permanent eNumber
Every user gets a unique E-XXXX identifier at signup. Permanently assigned, KYC-verified, works across all devices and borders. Never recycled.
🤖 AI-Powered Calls
NVIDIA AI actively optimises every call in real time — noise suppression, latency compensation, and audio enhancement. Premium quality even on weak networks.
🔒 P2P Encrypted
All calls are WebRTC peer-to-peer encrypted. No carrier in the middle. eNumber to eNumber. Pure internet communications with zero telecom fees.
📱 QR Connect
Every user gets a unique QR code. Point your camera at someone's QR and instantly add them as a contact. Digital identity made physical.
💬 Encrypted Messaging
Send messages eNumber to eNumber. No phone number needed. No SIM needed. Just your permanent eNative identity.
🌍 Cross-Border
Move from Lagos to Nairobi to Cape Town. Your eNumber comes with you. No roaming. No new SIM. No lost contacts. Your identity travels with you.
BADGE SYSTEM

Your badge signals who you are.

Four tiers of verified identity. Early adopters earn permanent Founder status — a badge that can never be minted again after the first 1,000.

🟣 FOUNDER · SLOTS 1–1,000
🔵 BUSINESS · SMME & PRO
🟢 VERIFIED · KYC CONFIRMED
🟡 COMMUNITY · NETWORK ENDORSED

Claim your eNumber
before it's gone.

Only 1,000 Founder slots exist. Once they're gone, they're gone forever. Be part of the origin story of African digital identity.
